name: Caramel Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. The flavor of this golden brown fudge comes from the caramelized sugar.
2. Combine 4 cups sugar and cream in a heavy 4-quart saucepan. Set aside.
3. Melt 2 cups sugar in a heavy 10-inch skillet over medium heat. Stir constantly until it begins to melt.
4. Heat the sugar-cream mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly. Do not let it scorch.
5. Once completely melted, slowly pour the liquid sugar into the boiling sugar-cream mixture while stirring constantly.
6. Remove from heat and stir in baking soda and butter. Allow the mixture to stand for 30 minutes.
7. Add the pecans and stir to mix. Pour into a buttered 9-inch square pan.
8. Let cool slightly, then cut into squares. Makes about 78 pieces.
